description_long: This is a modern four-door police car with a black and white color scheme, featuring a prominent 'Police' label on both side doors. The vehicle has a robust front grille guard, alloy wheels, and a streamlined body typical of urban law enforcement vehicles. On the roof, there is a light bar with red and blue emergency lights, positioned centrally for maximum visibility. The rear of the car displays additional police markings and tail lights, while the windows are tinted for privacy and security. The overall design is functional and authoritative, suitable for patrolling city streets and responding to emergencies.
description: A black and white four-door police car with 'Police' markings, a roof-mounted red and blue light bar, and a sturdy front grille guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille guard, windshield, and the red and blue light bar on the roof.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the 'Police' text, four doors, alloy wheels, and the full length of the light bar.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the tail lights, 'Police' marking, and the back of the light bar.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with 'Police' text, four doors, and visible emergency lights.
attribute_police_markings: The word 'Police' is prominently displayed in bold black letters on both side doors. The rear of the vehicle also features the word 'Police' in white letters. No department names, numbers, or additional law enforcement identifiers are visible.
attribute_emergency_lights: A roof-mounted light bar is present, featuring red and blue rectangular lights arranged side by side. The red light is on the left and the blue light is on the right when viewed from the front.
attribute_license_plate: A license plate is visible on the front and rear of the vehicle, colored white with black text. The text is not fully legible, and there are no special markings or codes apparent.
